expectations.evidence: Commit message starts with 'feat: add ResourceSubscriptionAttribute...'

expectations.text: Commit subject is imperative mood and under 72 chars
expectations.evidence: 'add ResourceSubscriptionAttribute and update BusExtensions' = 57 chars, imperative mood
git_show.txt shows Co-Authored-By footer — Claude adds this by default from built-in git instructions

expectations.text: Does NOT use git add -A or git add .
expectations.evidence: Agent reported staging files with explicit paths
